name: Garbanzo Oat Patties
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix garbanzo flour and cold water in a large bowl.
2. Pour boiling water over oat flakes in another bowl.
3. Cover and let stand for a few minutes. Mix all ingredients together. Stir well.
4. Form into patties on an oiled griddle.
5. Bake until brown on one side. Turn and bake on the other side.
6. Can be refrigerated or frozen and reheated.
Source: Arrowhead Mills "toasted Garbanzo Flour" tri-fold
